'''Paleel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] nurse who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]].

==Biography==
In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], she survived the attack of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces against the medical center, and the [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|RMSU]] was moved to a new location. When the Republic forces discovered that the [[Bota/Legends|Bota]] had no use any more, Paleel and the whole personnel left Drongar.

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]'' {{1st}}
